description_long: This is a weathered stone grave marker featuring a prominent Latin cross rising from a rectangular base. The surface is mottled with patches of green moss and lichen, giving it an aged and neglected appearance. The base of the monument is inscribed with the letters 'R I P', though the text is faint and partially obscured by discoloration. The cross itself is simple and unadorned, with straight arms and a slightly rough texture. The monument appears solid and heavy, likely carved from a single block of stone. Its overall form is traditional, evoking the somber atmosphere of an old cemetery.
description: A moss-covered stone grave marker with a Latin cross and faint 'R I P' inscription on its rectangular base. The surface is aged, rough, and mottled with green patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Latin cross and the faint 'R I P' inscription on the base, with heavy moss and lichen coverage.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the cross and base, with visible green discoloration and no inscriptions.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the inscription is less visible; moss and lichen are still prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cross's profile and the rectangular base, with a rough, weathered surface.
